# GitHub Repo Metadata

## Short description

Vibe Voice is a local real-time viewer for AI assistant responses, with optional TTS and desktop dictation utilities.

## Suggested topics

- ai
- voice
- dictation
- tts
- whisper
- websocket
- python
- fastapi
- vscode
- cursor
- kiro
- codex

## Suggested website

If you want, use the repository URL itself until you have a docs site:

- https://github.com/Jovenjr/Vibe-Voice
